commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards `params.sourceReplyDeliveryMode` into the Codex app-server active-run handle, adds regression coverage for message-tool-only steering, and records the fix in the changelog.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +38, Docs +1. Total +40 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main rejects `message_tool_only` queued replies when the active handle lacks that mode, and the current Codex app-server handle omits it; this read-only review did not run the Vitest proof.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the PR has no actionable findings; exact-head checks and mergeability can gate the armed automerge path.

target.title: fix(codex): preserve source reply mode for active runs
